# EasyFit

> EasyFit publishes Interval Timer Tabata and HIIT, an iPhone and Apple Watch app for timed Tabata, HIIT, circuit, EMOM, AMRAP, boxing, mobility, and home workout sessions.

## Primary Pages

- [Interval Timer Tabata and HIIT](https://easyfit.support/): Main product page for the EasyFit interval timer app.
- [Tabata Timer](https://easyfit.support/tabata-timer.html): Guide page for classic 20/10 and custom Tabata interval workouts.
- [HIIT Interval Timer](https://easyfit.support/hiit-interval-timer.html): Guide page for HIIT work/rest intervals, rounds, cues, and progress.
- [Apple Watch HIIT Timer](https://easyfit.support/apple-watch-hiit-timer.html): Guide page for Apple Watch heart-rate workflows, haptics, and Apple Health.
- [Interval Timer App](https://easyfit.support/interval-timer.html): Guide page for circuit training, EMOM, AMRAP, boxing, mobility, and home workouts.
- [Support](https://easyfit.support/support.html): Contact page for app support.
- [Privacy Notice](https://easyfit.support/privacy.html): Privacy information for the iOS app and website.
- [Terms of Use](https://easyfit.support/terms.html): Terms for the iOS app.

## Localized Pages

- [Deutsch](https://easyfit.support/de.html)
- [Español](https://easyfit.support/es.html)
- [Français](https://easyfit.support/fr.html)

- [Português](https://easyfit.support/pt-br.html)
- [日本語](https://easyfit.support/ja.html)
- [한국어](https://easyfit.support/ko.html)
- [简体中文](https://easyfit.support/zh-hans.html)

## App Summary

Interval Timer Tabata and HIIT helps users create timed workout sessions with custom work periods, rest periods, rounds, preparation, cooldown, and exercise lists. It supports Apple Watch heart-rate workflows, Apple Health integration, haptic cues, voice prompts, music controls, widgets, progress tracking, and personal fitness routines.

## Keywords and Topics

- Tabata timer
- HIIT interval timer
- interval timer app
- Apple Watch workout timer
- Apple Health fitness app
- circuit training timer
- EMOM timer
- AMRAP timer
- boxing round timer
- home workout timer
- haptic workout cues
- voice-guided interval training
- 20/10 Tabata workout timer
- custom work/rest interval timer
- Apple Watch HIIT timer with heart rate
- workout timer for iPhone
- gym circuit timer
- fitness timer with haptic cues

- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6764888681)
